query:
UPDATE product_variants 
SET 
  productLength = CASE WHEN productLength > 10 THEN productLength / 100 ELSE productLength END,
  productWidth = CASE WHEN productWidth > 10 THEN productWidth / 100 ELSE productWidth END,
  productHeight = CASE WHEN productHeight > 10 THEN productHeight / 100 ELSE productHeight END,
  packageLength = CASE WHEN packageLength > 10 THEN packageLength / 100 ELSE packageLength END,
  packageWidth = CASE WHEN packageWidth > 10 THEN packageWidth / 100 ELSE packageWidth END,
  packageHeight = CASE WHEN packageHeight > 10 THEN packageHeight / 100 ELSE packageHeight END,
  cbm = CASE 
    WHEN packageLength > 10 AND packageWidth > 10 AND packageHeight > 10
    THEN (packageLength / 100) * (packageWidth / 100) * (packageHeight / 100)
    WHEN packageLength IS NOT NULL AND packageWidth IS NOT NULL AND packageHeight IS NOT NULL
    THEN packageLength * packageWidth * packageHeight
    ELSE cbm 
  END
WHERE packageLength IS NOT NULL;

  productWidth = CASE WHEN productWidth > 10 THEN productWidth / 100 ELSE productWidth END,

  packageHeight = CASE WHEN packageHeight > 10 THEN packageHeight / 100 ELSE packageHeight END,
  cbm = CASE 
    WHEN packageLength > 10 AND packageWidth > 10 AND packageHeight > 10
    THEN (packageLength / 100) * (packageWidth / 100) * (packageHeight / 100)
    WHEN packageLength IS NOT NULL AND packageWidth IS NOT NULL AND packageHeight IS NOT NULL
    THEN packageLength * packageWidth * packageHeight
    ELSE cbm 
  END
WHERE packageLength IS NOT NULL;
